# Pull Request

## Summary

- 

## Type

- [ ] UI / interaction
- [ ] Scenario
- [ ] Scanner report-card UX
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Governance / project metadata
- [ ] Tests or maintenance

## Scenario Checklist

For scenario changes, include:

- [ ] scenario name
- [ ] description
- [ ] user goal
- [ ] workflow steps
- [ ] failure toggles
- [ ] source system state
- [ ] naive result
- [ ] protected result
- [ ] expected receipt fields
- [ ] copyable fix code
- [ ] tests

## Honesty Checks

- [ ] Local repo scanning is described as CLI plus paste/upload, not browser folder access.
- [ ] Low-confidence scanner findings stay labeled as review prompts.
- [ ] Claims match current `agent-consistency` package behavior.

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make static-demo`
